title: Episode archive page missing episodes from Dec 2025 - Feb 2026
description: The archive page only goes back to March 2026. Need to back-fill show notes HTML for episodes from December 2025 through February 2026 and regenerate the episode index.
author: rebecca-price

title: Add Covenant Insurance Group sponsor logo to homepage
description: Covenant Insurance Group renewed their sponsorship for Q1 2026. Add their updated logo and tagline to the sponsors section on the homepage.
author: tj-jackson

title: Contact form emails going to spam
description: Listener emails submitted through the contact form are hitting spam filters. Need to verify SPF/DKIM records and test with a mail tester before the New Year re-air week.
author: tj-jackson

title: Update bio page with 2026 headshot and updated credential list
description: Current bio page uses the 2023 headshot. Replace with the new photo from the March 2026 station shoot. Also update credential section to list 2024 APC renewal.
author: rebecca-price

title: Add Instagram feed widget (@morningreflectionsrebecca)
description: Embed a live Instagram feed widget on the homepage showing the last 6 posts from @morningreflectionsrebecca. Use a lightweight embed that degrades gracefully if JS is blocked.
author: marcus-price

title: Script crashes when guest bio contains em-dash characters
description: The show-notes generator fails with a UnicodeEncodeError when the guest bio has em-dashes. Happens on Windows and also in the GitLab CI runner. Need to set UTF-8 encoding explicitly on the output file handle.
author: rebecca-price

title: Add segment-outline template for faith-and-mental-health episodes
description: The current template only covers the standard interview format. Need a new template for the recurring faith-and-mental-health segments that includes a pastoral reflection block, listener call-in prompt, and resource list footer.
author: rebecca-price

title: Automate weekly show-notes PDF export
description: Currently exporting the PDF manually from the HTML output. Add a CI pipeline step to auto-generate and attach the PDF artifact after each Thursday push so it is ready for Friday review.
author: rebecca-price

title: CPE hour import fails for events entered with 12-hour time format
description: When importing CSV logs where event times are in 12-hour AM/PM format the parser throws a ValueError. Need to handle both formats or normalize on import.
author: rebecca-price

title: Add year-end summary report showing hours by category
description: Need a report that breaks out the 50 required CPE hours by category (clinical, didactic, supervisory, interfaith) and shows remaining hours needed. Deadline is 2026-12-31.
author: rebecca-price

title: Export 2025 CPE completion report as PDF for APC renewal
description: Generate and export the 2025 full-year CPE completion summary for submission to the Association of Professional Chaplains. Include all attended trainings, supervisory hours, and peer consultation sessions.
author: rebecca-price

title: Finalize vendor list and booth assignments for community health fair
description: Need to confirm all 14 vendor slots, assign booths on the church grounds map, and send confirmation emails. Deacon Mosley has the signed contracts; need copies uploaded to the repo docs folder.
author: rebecca-price

title: Create volunteer sign-up page linked from church bulletin
description: Build a simple sign-up form (Google Form embed or static HTML form) listing the 8 volunteer roles. Sandra Coles confirmed she will manage the nursing station; need 2 more RNs.
author: rebecca-price

title: Draft fair schedule and print-ready program
description: Create the hour-by-hour schedule for the health fair day. Include opening devotion (Rebecca), blood pressure screenings (Sandra's team), children's wellness activity, and closing prayer. Export as print-ready PDF.
author: rebecca-price

title: Add prior-year recap to README for new volunteers
description: New volunteers have no context on how the fair runs. Add a brief recap of the 2025 fair - attendance numbers, top booth, lessons learned - so onboarding is faster this year.
author: naomi-price

title: Covenant Insurance Group Q1 invoice not sent
description: The January 1 sponsor invoice for Covenant Insurance Group was not generated because the template script referenced the wrong billing contact. Fix the contact lookup and re-run for January.
author: rebecca-price

title: Add Mitchell's Flowers seasonal promo rate to invoice template
description: Mitchell's Flowers is running a winter promo rate for January-March. Update the invoice template to include a line for the seasonal discount and correct the total calculation.
author: rebecca-price
